description_long: This is a child's Mary Jane-style shoe featuring a dark blue fabric upper adorned with a repeating pattern of light pink hearts. The shoe has a single Velcro strap across the instep for secure fastening, with the brand name 'Ciqo' embroidered in white on the strap. The sole is made of light blue rubber, textured for grip and durability, and wraps slightly up the toe and heel for added protection. A small pink pull tab is present at the heel for easy on and off. The interior appears to be lined with a soft, cushioned material for comfort. The overall design is playful and practical, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A dark blue Mary Jane-style child's shoe with pink heart patterns, a Velcro strap, and a light blue rubber sole. Features a pink heel tab and cushioned interior.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the pink pull tab and the heart pattern wrapping around the heel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the heart pattern, the Velcro strap, and the full profile of the light blue sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe, heart pattern on the toe box, and the opening for the foot.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the 'Ciqo' branding on the Velcro strap and the overall shoe profile.
attribute_logo: White 'Ciqo' text on the Velcro strap
